Reuters reported, citing shipping data, that at least seven vessels, primarily dry bulk carriers, have transited the Strait of #Hormuz over the past 24 hours.

It added that tracking data from Kpler, along with satellite analysis by data analytics firm SynMax, indicated that the vessels included ships departing Iraqi ports, as well as one dry bulk carrier from an Iranian port.
